path_coin_count: {lane_runner_path_rule_text} How many coins does the runner collect?
{lane_runner_path_rule_text} Count the coins lying on that shown path.
{lane_runner_path_rule_text} How many visible coins are collected along the path?
{lane_runner_path_rule_text} Count only coins in cells touched by the shown path.
{lane_runner_path_rule_text} What is the number of coins collected by this path?
safe_path_label: {safe_path_rule_text} Which labeled path reaches the finish safely?
{safe_path_rule_text} Select the path label that avoids all hazard cells.
{safe_path_rule_text} Which candidate path can be followed without hitting a hazard?
{safe_path_rule_text} Find the labeled route that stays clear of every hazard cell.
{safe_path_rule_text} Which displayed path is safe all the way to the finish?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_two_lane_track: a two-lane runner track with a start marker, a finish band, and visible coins in lane cells
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_two_lane_track_path_c: a two-lane runner track with a start marker, a finish band, visible coins in lane cells, and one shown path
code_prompt_defaults.lane_runner_path_rule_text: Follow the shown path from start to finish. Each step moves one row toward the finish; the path may stay in the same lane or switch diagonally to the other lane.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_path_coin_count: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every coin collected by the shown path
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_path_coin_count: set "answer" to the number of coins collected by the shown path
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_two_lane_track_safe_p: labeled candidate path cards, each showing a two-lane track with hazard cells and one candidate path
code_prompt_defaults.safe_path_rule_text: Each path moves one row toward the finish. A safe path never enters a hazard cell.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_safe_path_label: set "annotation" to one bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected path card
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_safe_path_label: set "answer" to the selected path label as a capital letter
